description_long: This is a small, single-engine, fixed-wing airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is streamlined and painted primarily white, with a registration number 'N1332A' visible on the side. The cockpit is enclosed with large, dark-tinted windows, suggesting seating for one or two pilots. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel, all fixed and non-retractable. The overall design is typical of light general aviation aircraft, suitable for personal or training use.
description: A small, white, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a tricycle landing gear and enclosed cockpit, featuring a visible registration number and streamlined fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wing, single propeller at the nose, and registration number 'N1332A' on the fuselage.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, central propeller, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the high wing, propeller, and tail assembly visible, as well as the registration number.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail's conventional design, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the main landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with large side windows, likely configured for one or two seats.
